description.from: Deals a total of ??? M.DMG over 7 attacks to nearby enemies in a circular range of self. Then, attacks frontal enemies in range, dealing ??? M.DMG and knocking them down for 3 sec.
description.to: Deals 46*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 26.2% of ATK M.DMG 7times to nearby enemies within a circular area, then deals 384*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 263.1% of ATK M.DMG to enemies in a frontal area and inflicts Down for 1.5sec.

description.from: Unleashes the power of [Arcane Crystals] within to deal ??? M.DMG to all enemies and stun them for 2 sec. Upon casting, activates [Arcane Crystal Awakening] for 15 sec, which increases ATK Spd of all allies by 300 and releases a shockwave every 2 sec to enemies in range of self, dealing ??? M.DMG and stunning them for 1 sec.
description.to: Deals 255*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 145% of ATK M.DMG to all enemies and inflicts Stun for 0.5sec. Upon casting, enters [Arcane Crystal Awakening] for 10sec, increasing ATK SPD by 35%. While active, releases a shockwave every 1.3sec, dealing 44*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 27.8% of ATK M.DMG to nearby enemies.

description.from: Summons [Arcane Crystals] and deals ??? M.DMG to frontal enemies in a straight line. Shortly afterward, causes an explosion that deals ??? additional M.DMG and inflicts [Arcane Crystal Curse] upon enemies for 5 sec, reducing their ATK Spd by 200. Attacking enemies under [Arcane Crystal Curse] inflicts a stack of [Arcane Crystal Energy]. [Arcane Crystal Curse] explodes after 5 sec, dealing M.DMG equal to ??? + ??? per stack of [Arcane Crystal] Energy.
description.to:
Summons an Arcane Crystal, dealing 518*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 221.3% of ATK M.DMG to enemies in a frontal line, then causes an explosion that deals 828*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 354% of ATK additional M.DMG. Enemies hit are inflicted with [Arcane Crystal Curse] for 5sec, and when Kirze attacks enemies under [Arcane Crystal Curse], applies stacks of [Arcane Crystal Energy].

[Arcane Crystal Curse]: Reduces ATK SPD by 10%, and after 5sec, deals 290*(0.7+(0.3*Skill Level*Awakening Coefficient)) + 200% of ATK M.DMG + 43% of ATK M.DMG per stack of [Arcane Crystal Energy], then resets all stacks.

description.from: Increases own ATK by ??? and Crit Chance by 200 , while increasing the duration of CCs that all allies inflict to Bosses by 30%.
description.to: Changes base Mana Recovery per sec to 150, increases Crit Chance by 250, and increases the duration of CCs that all allies inflict on Bosses by 15%.

dark.from: When there is 1 enemy, increases DMG by 100%.
dark.to: Each use increases DMG by 15%. This effect can stack up to 10 times.

light.to: Increases Mana Cost by 1000 but increases duration by 4 sec.

dark.from: Increases the caster's DMG to all Non-hero enemies by 20% while under [Arcane Crystall Awakening].
dark.to: Increases ATK SPD by an additional 35%.

light.to: [Arcane Crystal Curse] additionally reduces ATK SPD by 10%.

light.from: Increases DMG to Non-hero enemies by 25% for 20 sec at the beginning of each battle.
light.to: At the start of battle, increases damage dealt to non-hero enemies by 65% for 10 sec.

description.from: [Slash Blade of Judgment!] Increases DMG by {0}% and reduces Mana Cost by 1.
description.to: [Slash, Blade of Judgment! ] Increases DMG by {0}% and reduces Mana Cost by 1000.

description.from: [Disperse, Crystal Haze!] Increases ATK Spd by an additional {0} and increases DEF Penetration of all allies by 250 for the duration of Skill.
description.to: [Disperse, Crystal Haze!] Increases ATK SPD of all allies by 10% and increases DEF Penetration of all allies by {0}.

description.from: [Bloom, Crimson Flower!] Decreases Cooldown by 30%, and gaining 1 stack of [Arcane Crystal Energy] has a {0}% chance to add 3 additional stacks.
description.to: [Bloom, Crimson Flower!] Increases DMG by {0}%, and gains 1 additional stack when [Arcane Crystal Energy] is stacked.

description.from: [End to Evil Deeds!] Increases Crit Chance by an additional 250 and the effect of the duration of CC increases chances to {0}%.
description.to: [End to Evil Deeds!] Increases Crit DMG by 32%, and changes the CC duration increase effect to {0}%.

dark.from: Increases Crit DMG by 40% and DEF Penetration by 150. This effect is boosted by 2 times once Kirze attacks the enemy 100 times.
dark.to: Increases Crit DMG by 30% and DEF Penetration by 150. This effect increases by 2 times after Kirze attacks the enemy 100 times.

description.from: Amplifies the power of Arcane Crystals and greatly increases the effect range of [Bloom, Crimson Flower!]. Normal and Skill attacks have a 4% chance to deal additional M.DMG equal to {0}% of ATK. DMG is doubled against Bosses.
description.to: Greatly increases the effect range of [Bloom, Crimson Flower!].Normal and Skill attacks have a 8% chance to deal additional M.DMG equal to {0}% of ATK. DMG is increased by 2 times against Bosses.

description.from: Summons the Soul of Judgment Edge, Elicipira, changing the activation chance of the additional M.DMG effect of Judgment Edge, Elicipira to 10% and reducing All DMG taken by 40% for 10 sec.
description.to: Summons the Soul of Judgment Edge, Elicipira for 10sec, changing the activation chance of Judgment Edge, Elicipira’s additional M.DMG to 20% and reducing M.DMG taken by 50%.

1.from: For the duration of Skill, Increases ATK by 50%.
1.to: For the duration of Skill, increases ATK by 45%.

2.from: Increases the duration by 5 sec and changes the activation chance of Judgment Edge, Elicipira to 15%.
2.to: Changes the activation chance of Elicipira’s additional M.DMG to 30%.
